content:
# Transpiration

**Summary**: The process by which water is taken up from the soil by plant roots and released into the atmosphere through leaves.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2024]] measured transpiration rates to evaluate irrigation efficiency.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2024]] Crucial for determining the amount of water actually used by the crop.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2024]] Simulated via HYDRUS-1D model.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Transpiration increased as the irrigation frequency decreased, while evaporation decreased. ([[2024-prasetyo|Prasetyo, 2024, p. 87]])
